name: Xinyangfeng Agricultural Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinyangfeng Agricultural Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, and production of fertilizers in China. Its products include ammonium acid phosphate and potassium sulfate compound fertilizers; controlled release, urea formaldehyde, water-soluble, nitro group, and organic and inorganic fertilizers; special, potassium, urine-based, tower, BB, and P series fertilizers; and superphosphate and bicarbonate fertilizers, as well as hydrochloric acid. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Hubei Xinyangfeng Fertilizer Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xinyangfeng Agricultural Technology Co., Ltd. in May 2019. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jingmen, China.
